category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides syntax-highlighted side-by-side diffs in the terminal; official GitHub README says GitHub-style split diffs with syntax highlighting.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-split-diffs; official GitHub README title is git-split-diffs.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README includes usage, installation, customization, themes, performance, and troubleshooting.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository, and the repository README matches the package description.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify a terminal Git diff viewer with syntax highlighting.
